experiment: AFE axis-level blind rescore (B vs D adjudication)
basis: 既存 walking outputs を axis 単位へ分解、blind axis-level scoring。理由: weighted H/P/M は各条件を1単位で見て個別 axis を採点せず、1useful+2irrelevant と 2useful+1irrelevant が同じ P になる。B vs D には axis-level precision/irrelevant accounting が必要。

preregistered_interpretation.skepticism_sufficient: B recall/useful >= D AND B axis_precision ~= D AND B irrelevant/over-trigger ~= D → generic skepticism may be sufficient; AFE value vs B not demonstrated
preregistered_interpretation.afe_precision_advantage: D axis_precision > B OR D irrelevant/over-trigger materially lower while useful recovery preserved → AFE has operational precision/compression advantage over single generic skepticism
preregistered_interpretation.afe_overconstrains: D useful recovery < B without safety advantage → AFE overconstrains reasoning

scorer: external-weight (Claude) load-bearing for B/D; Qwen blind secondary/primary-anonymization
